profiles.label: OpenAI Responses API
profiles.notes: Primary OpenAI API profile. Use Responses API semantics for programmable execution.

profiles.label: Codex Workspace Agent
profiles.notes: Uses the current coding workspace agent channel rather than direct provider API credentials.

profiles.label: Anthropic Messages API
profiles.notes: Direct Anthropic API profile for Claude model comparisons.

profiles.label: Claude Code Native
profiles.notes: Native Claude Code configuration against Anthropic endpoints.

profiles.label: Z.AI OpenAI-Compatible API
profiles.notes: Primary GLM API profile. The official quick start describes OpenAI-compatible tool configuration via https://api.z.ai/api/paas/v4.

profiles.label: Z.AI via Claude Code Bridge
profiles.notes: Official Z.AI quick start for Claude Code uses ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN plus ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic.

profiles.label: NVIDIA NIM Endpoint
profiles.notes: Supports a hosted or self-managed NIM endpoint once a base URL and one API key variable are present.

profiles.label: NVIDIA NIM Container Access
profiles.notes: Container/image access for self-hosted NIM flows. This is infrastructure auth rather than prompt-dispatch auth.
